title: Causality Chain Implementation
purpose: Implement causality tracking so that every event references its triggering parent, enabling full causal reconstruction.
architectural_constraints: Causality must be explicit, not inferred from timestamps
Support concurrent executions with interleaved events
acceptance_criteria: Causality chains are complete for all events in an execution
Causal breaks detected and flagged as critical violations
Replay from events + checkpoints reconstructs identical causality
